TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: zyugi' mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. mnhhway qmara' sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'.
S.PHON: zju…£i Ē mzju…£i Ē s~…ēun na tajal ńßja Ē …£a, ariŇč s~…ēa ini Ē uwańß na Ē qu …£ipun ńß…£a, nanak jaquw mnwańß m…£a…£a Ē s~…ēqu rjax na ma…£al ina Ē …£a nanu Ē s~…ēi kij min ĒariŇč mtalańß l…£a jas~…ēa qu mutuw mzju…£i Ē. mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē s~…ēun mańßa zju…£i Ē na tajal ő≤alaj ńßja Ē …£a, nanu Ē qu s~…ēun mańßa mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē ka jas~…ēa s~…ēij s~…ē Ērux ini Ē Ēnrawmul ijal, ruw mnńßawńßwaj mkura Ē taj Ēzil, ini Ē …£a taj Ēllaw ms~…ēńßzi Ē.
S.FORM: zyugi' mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. mnhhway qmara' sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'.
S.PHON: zju…£i Ē mzju…£i Ē s~…ēun na tajal ńßja Ē …£a, ariŇč s~…ēa ini Ē uwańß na Ē qu …£ipun ńß…£a, nanak jaquw mnwańß m…£a…£a Ē s~…ēqu rjax na ma…£al ina Ē …£a nanu Ē s~…ēi kij min ĒariŇč mtalańß l…£a jas~…ēa qu mutuw mzju…£i Ē. mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē s~…ēun mańßa zju…£i Ē na tajal ő≤alaj ńßja Ē …£a, nanu Ē qu s~…ēun mańßa mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē ka jas~…ēa s~…ēij s~…ē Ērux ini Ē Ēnrawmul ijal, ruw mnńßawńßwaj mkura Ē taj Ēzil, ini Ē …£a taj Ēllaw ms~…ēńßzi Ē.
